about-content: CheckReel is part of Alwafer Media, specialising in social-media management, AI-driven apps and precision marketing campaigns. We help creators scan videos, images and audio for policy violations before they post — saving time, protecting brands and avoiding strikes or bans.
dashboard-intro: CheckReel protects your content before you post — giving AI-powered compliance checks so you don’t get flagged, muted, or demonetized. Scan across regions and platforms like TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and more, before your content ever goes live. 🚀 Upgrade to CheckReel+ for saved scans, export features, and extended limits.
upload-note: 💡 Supported formats: mp4, jpg, png, mp3, wav, mov, webm, gif, aac, opus
upgrade-note: 🚀 Upgrade to CheckReel+ for saved results, faster scans, and full platform access — $9.99/mo.
